title: Issue DEMO-303 returned from sprint to backlog
reason: Sprint field was removed in changelog.
recommended_action: Ask why it returned and whether scope/priority changed.

title: New issue DEMO-401
reason: Issue appeared in Jira changes since selected period.
recommended_action: Triage the new issue and decide whether it belongs to sprint, next sprint, or backlog.

title: DEMO-101 may be stuck in In Progress
reason: Issue stayed in status for 4 days, threshold is 3.
recommended_action: Ask current owner for real state and move/update the issue if needed.
